current_default_chain_note: Historical ABCD mapping retained for compatibility. Current default deployment candidate is ABD integrated / ABD_SAFE; final trust/UI output is generated by firmware Fusion arbitration.

FINAL_NORMAL_CONFIDENT.final_reason: All core signals are usable; no major risk hint.

PPG_DEGRADED_ECG_OK.final_reason: ECG is usable, but PPG/SpO2 is degraded; retest PPG contact if SpO2 or PPG-HR is required.

ECG_DEGRADED_PPG_OK.final_reason: PPG is usable, but ECG is degraded; fix ECG contact/lead condition before ECG rhythm interpretation.

RHYTHM_SUSPECT_RETEST.final_reason: ECG rhythm-risk hint detected; retest under stable contact and stillness. Not a clinical conclusion.

MOTION_DEGRADED.final_reason: Motion may degrade signal reliability; keep still and retest.

CONTACT_BAD_RETEST.final_reason: Contact or lead condition is unreliable; fix sensor contact and retest.

RECOVERY_WAIT.final_reason: Sensor recovery or physiological recovery window; wait and retest.

SENSOR_CONFLICT.final_reason: Sensor outputs conflict; retest under stable conditions.

MEASURE_FAILED.final_reason: Multiple core signals unavailable or invalid.

FINAL_UNCERTAIN.final_reason: Information is insufficient for confident measurement.
